reason: The candidate correctly states the core §412 rule: statutory damages/fees require registration either before infringement began or within 3 months of first publication. Given the current date (July 2026) and "mid-January" publication, the candidate reasonably concludes the 3-month window has passed (mid-April), so only actual damages/profits are available, and correctly notes registration is still required to file suit. This matches the reference's factual core (same rule, same consequence for being outside the window), just resolved concretely rather than left as an "if" conditional. The extra details (Fourth Estate citation, new-infringer nuance, DMCA takedown suggestion) are additive and don't contradict the reference.
